unnerve.name: Unnerve
unnerve.shortDescription: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries.
unnerve.description: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries. This Ability activates before hazards and other Abilities take effect.

unseenfist.name: Unseen Fist
unseenfist.shortDescription: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore the target's protection, except Max Guard.

vesselofruin.name: Vessel of Ruin
vesselofruin.shortDescription: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Special Attack multiplied by 0.75.

victorystar.name: Victory Star
victorystar.shortDescription: This Pokemon and its allies' moves have their accuracy multiplied by 1.1.

vitalspirit.name: Vital Spirit
vitalspirit.shortDescription: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.

voltabsorb.name: Volt Absorb
voltabsorb.shortDescription: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Electric moves; Electric immunity.
voltabsorb.description: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when hit by an Electric-type move.

wanderingspirit.name: Wandering Spirit
wanderingspirit.shortDescription: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability swapped with this one.
wanderingspirit.description: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability swapped with this one. Does not affect Pokemon with the Abilities As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.

waterabsorb.name: Water Absorb
waterabsorb.shortDescription: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Water moves; Water immunity.
waterabsorb.description: This Pokemon is immune to Water-type moves and restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when hit by a Water-type move.

waterbubble.name: Water Bubble
waterbubble.shortDescription: This Pokemon's Water power is 2x; it can't be burned; Fire power against it is halved.
waterbubble.description: This Pokemon's offensive stat is doubled while using a Water-type attack. If a Pokemon uses a Fire-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon. This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.

watercompaction.name: Water Compaction
watercompaction.shortDescription: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages after it is damaged by a Water-type move.

waterveil.name: Water Veil
waterveil.shortDescription: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.

weakarmor.name: Weak Armor
weakarmor.shortDescription: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.
weakarmor.description: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, its Defense is lowered by 1 stage and its Speed is raised by 2 stages.

wellbakedbody.name: Well-Baked Body
wellbakedbody.shortDescription: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages if hit by a Fire move; Fire immunity.
wellbakedbody.description: This Pokemon is immune to Fire-type moves and raises its Defense by 2 stages when hit by a Fire-type move.

whitesmoke.name: White Smoke
whitesmoke.shortDescription: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

wimpout.name: Wimp Out
wimpout.shortDescription: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.
wimpout.description: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, it immediately switches out to a chosen ally. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability. This effect applies to both direct and indirect damage, except Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, and confusion damage.

windpower.name: Wind Power
windpower.shortDescription: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.
windpower.description: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.

windrider.name: Wind Rider
windrider.shortDescription: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.
windrider.description: This Pokemon is immune to wind moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.

wonderguard.name: Wonder Guard
wonderguard.shortDescription: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.

wonderskin.name: Wonder Skin
wonderskin.shortDescription: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.
wonderskin.description: Non-damaging moves that check accuracy have their accuracy changed to 50% when used against this Pokemon. This effect comes before other effects that modify accuracy.

zenmode.name: Zen Mode
zenmode.shortDescription: If Darmanitan, at end of turn changes Mode to Standard if > 1/2 max HP, else Zen.
zenmode.description: If this Pokemon is a Darmanitan or Galarian Darmanitan, it changes to Zen Mode if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP at the end of a turn. If Darmanitan's HP is above 1/2 of its maximum HP at the end of a turn, it changes back to Standard Mode.

zerotohero.name: Zero to Hero
zerotohero.shortDescription: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.
